label: Practice Effort
parentMeaning: Shows whether the student is practising enough and whether accuracy is improving.

label: Mock Test Signal
parentMeaning: Shows how the student performs under timed test conditions.

label: Study Routine
parentMeaning: Shows whether the daily route tasks are being completed.

label: Revision Control
parentMeaning: Shows whether weak areas are being reviewed after practice.

label: Reflection Notes
parentMeaning: Shows whether the student is writing corrections and learning from mistakes.

label: Diagnostic Status
parentMeaning: Shows current level and weak skill areas if a diagnostic was attempted.
